🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

HEIC is the format the iPhone uses to save photos, and it looks great until you try to open it on Windows, attach it to an email, or upload it somewhere that only accepts JPG. This converter turns HEIC (and HEIF) photos into universally compatible JPG files instantly. Everything happens locally in your browser using your device's own processing power — your photos are never uploaded to any server, which matters a lot when the files are personal pictures.

How to convert

  1. Drag your HEIC photos into the box above, or click to choose them.
  2. VaultConvert decodes each photo in your browser — nothing is uploaded.
  3. Download your JPG files individually or all at once.

FAQ

Are my photos uploaded to a server?

No. The conversion runs entirely in your browser using WebAssembly. Your photos never leave your device, so there is nothing to leak or delete.

Will I lose quality converting HEIC to JPG?

JPG is a lossy format, but we encode at 92% quality, which keeps the result visually identical for almost all photos while staying compatible everywhere.

Can I convert many HEIC files at once?

Yes. Drop as many as you like and download them together. See the batch page for tips on large sets.

Related converters
